name: No Going Back Romance
overview: A teen romance of So Dam, a sixteen-year-old girl, who has never dated before but she receives her first-ever love confession from a mysterious boy. She is looking for the boy who secretly confessed to her.

trailers.title: 나나의 '노빠꾸 로맨스' 촬영 비하인드 EP01 | woo!ah! (우아!)
